title: The Unluckies Deliver the Pose
description: On pages 13–16, the unluckies deliver the pose as sanji discovers Mr. 3’s hideout and uses a Den Den Mushi call to mislead Crocodile while the fight on Little Garden continues.
scene: The Unluckies Deliver the Pose. Sanji discovers Mr. 3’s hideout and uses a Den Den Mushi call to mislead Crocodile while the fight on Little Garden continues. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: It's futile no matter what you do.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: CRESENDO STONE...! Let's see just how many kilograms your body can take...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: What a smart little bird you are...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhahahaha! Give it up already! Your friends are now my works of art!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmph! As if I'd let you! I'd never give away the lives of my friends...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: If fire can melt your wax, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll use this fire to melt it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Luffy! You won't be able to save them in time with that tiny flame! Light Karoo's rope on fire instead!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Time to wake up, you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It might get a bit hot,

summary: This part centers on the unluckies deliver the pose, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
